critic_notes: Section 8.4 (short: three sentences of continuous improvement guidance) is mined cleanly into three focused questions on goals, Praxistauglichkeit→Akzeptanz, and quality of formulation (Nachvollziehbarkeit/Verständlichkeit). Quotes are verbatim after normalization. Correct answers are directly supported; distractors are unambiguously off-topic. methodik + basis is appropriate — none of this requires synthesis.
